title: pouteria coelomatica
intro: Pouteria coelomatica, also known as the Amazonian tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Pouteria coelomatica include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and treat various ailments such as fever and rheumatism. Pouteria coelomatica can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
